title: Siphoneranthemum cordatus
taxonomy: Siphoneranthemum cordatus is a species of flowering plant in the family Bromeliaceae. This classification places Siphoneranthemum cordatus within the order Poales, which includes numerous plant families known for producing grasses, sedges, and various types of flowers. The Bromeliaceae family, also known as the pineapple family, is native to the Americas and comprises approximately 3,000 species of plants. Many of these plants are epiphytes, meaning they grow on other surfaces such as trees and rocks. By placing Siphoneranthemum cordatus within this family, we gain insight into its evolutionary history and characteristics.
